tasks.title: Implement planner agent for task decomposition
tasks.description: Add code in internal/agent/planner.go to call the HuggingFace LLM endpoint, send codebase summary and prompt, and parse the JSON response into task structs.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap LLM calls in a retryable HTTP client and expose a clean function Planner(prompt, context) ([]Task, error).

tasks.title: Create GitHub Issues integration
tasks.description: Implement issue creation, labeling, and status sync in internal/github/issues.go using the GitHub REST API and handle rate limits.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate GitHub operations behind an interface to allow mock implementations for tests.

tasks.title: Develop devdive.json state manager
tasks.description: Implement atomic read/write, validation, and versioning in internal/state/devdive.go, and ensure go:embed of the dashboard assets.
tasks.design_notes: Use a mutex-protected singleton pattern to avoid race conditions between watchers and CLI commands.

tasks.title: Build file system and WebSocket broadcast layer
tasks.description: Set up fsnotify watcher in internal/server/watcher.go to monitor devdive.json and other state changes, broadcasting updates via Gorilla WebSocket to connected clients.
tasks.design_notes: Maintain a hub that registers clients and queues messages to avoid blocking the watcher.

tasks.title: Implement Git commit analyzer
tasks.description: Create internal/watchers/git.go to poll new commits, extract diffs, send them to the LLM, and update task progress in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage go-git for repository access and process diffs in memory before invoking the LLM.

tasks.title: Add design review and drift detection
tasks.description: Implement internal/watchers/review.go to trigger every 10 commits or on demand, compare changed files against original design notes via the LLM, and record findings.
tasks.design_notes: Store review results in the devdive.json 'reviews' array with severity levels for dashboard rendering.

tasks.title: Create Cobra CLI commands and wiring
tasks.description: Develop cmd/init, cmd/run, cmd/status, cmd/sync, cmd/review, and cmd/rollback commands, wiring them to the new agents and server components.
tasks.design_notes: Each command should invoke a single orchestrator function to keep the CLI thin and testable.
